en: Finally, brothers, pray for us, that the word of the Lord may speed ahead and be honored, as happened among you,
zh: 最後，弟兄們，請為我們禱告，好叫主的道也像在你們那裡一樣快快傳開，得著榮耀，

en: and that we may be delivered from wicked and evil men. For not all have faith.
zh: 也使我們能夠脫離那些不講理的惡人，因為不是人人都有信心。

en: But the Lord is faithful. He will establish you and guard you against the evil one.
zh: 主是信實的，他必堅定你們，保護你們脫離那惡者。

en: And we have confidence in the Lord about you, that you are doing and will do the things that we command.
zh: 我們靠著主深深相信，你們現在以及將來都會遵行我們所吩咐的，

en: May the Lord direct your hearts to the love of God and to the steadfastness of Christ.
zh: 願主引導你們的心，使你們有 神的愛和基督的堅忍。

en: Now we command you, brothers, in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, that you keep away from any brother who is walking in idleness and not in accord with the tradition that you received from us.
zh: 弟兄們，我們奉主耶穌基督的名吩咐你們，凡是游手好閒的弟兄，不按著你們從我們所領受的教訓去行，就應當遠離他。

en: For you yourselves know how you ought to imitate us, because we were not idle when we were with you,
zh: 你們自己本來就知道應當怎樣效法我們，因為我們在你們中間並沒有游手好閒，

en: nor did we eat anyone's bread without paying for it, but with toil and labor we worked night and day, that we might not be a burden to any of you.
zh: 也沒有白吃過誰的飯，反而辛苦勞碌，晝夜作工，免得加重你們任何一人的負擔。

en: It was not because we do not have that right, but to give you in ourselves an example to imitate.
zh: 這不是因為我們沒有權利，而是要給你們作榜樣，好讓你們效法我們。

en: For even when we were with you, we would give you this command: If anyone is not willing to work, let him not eat.
zh: 我們在你們那裡的時候，曾經吩咐過你們，如果有人不肯作工，就不可吃飯。

en: For we hear that some among you walk in idleness, not busy at work, but busybodies.
zh: 因為我們聽說，你們中間有人游手好閒，甚麼工也不作，反倒專管閒事。

en: Now such persons we command and encourage in the Lord Jesus Christ to do their work quietly and to earn their own living.
zh: 我們靠著主耶穌基督，吩咐勸戒這樣的人，要安靜作工，自食其力。

en: As for you, brothers, do not grow weary in doing good.
zh: 弟兄們，你們行善不可灰心。

en: If anyone does not obey what we say in this letter, take note of that person, and have nothing to do with him, that he may be ashamed.
zh: 如果有人不聽從我們這封信上的訓勉，要把這個人記下來，不可和他來往，好叫他自己覺得慚愧。

en: Do not regard him as an enemy, but warn him as a brother.
zh: 但不要把他看作仇敵，卻要勸他好像勸弟兄一樣。

en: Now may the Lord of peace himself give you peace at all times in every way. The Lord be with you all.
zh: 願賜平安的主親自隨時隨地賜平安給你們。願主與你們眾人同在。

en: I, Paul, write this greeting with my own hand. This is the sign of genuineness in every letter of mine; it is the way I write.
zh: 我保羅親筆問候你們。這是我每一封信的記號；我的筆跡就是這樣。

en: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you all.
zh: 願我們主耶穌基督的恩惠與你們眾人同在。
